title: rosa spinosissima var. glandulosa
intro: Rosa spinosissima var. glandulosa, also known as the glandular prickly rose, is a variety of rose species native to Europe, known for its fragrant pink flowers and thorny stems. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, digestive issues, and menstrual disorders. The health benefits of Rosa spinosissima var. glandulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and regulate menstrual cycles. Rosa spinosissima var. glandulosa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
